steps.title: Find opposing attitudes
steps.content: The claim requires a quotation that contrasts the narrator's attitude toward life with Avey's attitude, so the quotation must show both viewpoints in opposition.

steps.title: Reject one-sided quotations
steps.content: Choice A describes Avey's silence. Choice B gives the narrator's irritation with a band. Choice C describes Avey smiling impersonally. These do not contrast both attitudes toward life. The remaining quotation sets Avey's indifference against the narrator's ambition. The answer is D.
